memberdef.name: DEST_FUNC_1
memberdef.initializer: if(rttiType == #TYPE) { \ return nb::cpp_function( \ [oid, fname](TYPE val) { \ return SetGet1<TYPE>::set(oid, fname, val); \ }, \ nb::arg("value")); \ }

memberdef.name: DEST_FUNC_2
memberdef.initializer: if(TOKENS[0] == #T1 && TOKENS[1] == #T2) { \ return nb::cpp_function( \ [oid, fname](const T1 &a, const T2 &b) { \ return SetGet2<T1, T2>::set(oid, fname, a, b); \ }, \ nb::arg("a"), nb::arg("b")); \ }

memberdef.name: DEST_FUNC_3
memberdef.initializer: if(TYPES[0] == #T1 && TYPES[1] == #T2 && TYPES[2] == #T3) { \ return nb::cpp_function( \ [oid, fname](const T1 &a, const T2 &b, const T3 &c) { \ return SetGet3<T1, T2, T3>::set(oid, fname, a, b, c); \ }, \ nb::arg("a"), nb::arg("b"), nb::arg("c")); \ }

memberdef.name: DEST_FUNC_4
memberdef.initializer: if(TYPES[0] == #T1 && TYPES[1] == #T2 && TYPES[2] == #T3 && \ TYPES[3] == #T4) { \ return nb::cpp_function( \ [oid, fname](const T1 &a, const T2 &b, const T3 &c, const T4 &d) { \ return SetGet4<T1, T2, T3, T4>::set(oid, fname, a, b, c, d); \ }, \ nb::arg("a"), nb::arg("b"), nb::arg("c"), nb::arg("d")); \ }
